_meta.note: Home page is a narrow hero card (~296px) overlaid on a hero image, with full-width section rails below. Two heading sizes coexist: 15/700 for boat-listing subsections (Boats Near You) and 22.5/700 for major sections (Featured Brands, Popular Boats, Recent Articles).

hero_card._real_class: .ai-search-v2__form (parent is a positioned hero overlay container)
hero_card.note: Hero search form sits at top-left of hero image at ~14px inset, narrow 296px width. NOT a full-page-width search bar — it's an overlay card.

hero_h1.note: Bold white text directly above the search form, same 14px x inset. Hero card contains H1 + form stacked vertically over the hero image.

section_headings._note: Real BT uses two H2 sizes on home: 15/700 for boat-listing subsections, 22.5/700 for major content sections.

boats_near_you._real_text: Boats Near You Based on your location
boats_near_you.subtext_inline: Based on your location (rendered inline after the heading)

popular_boat_types._status: not found in 2026-05-23 probe — section may have been removed or renamed since the FIDELITY.md row was written

boats_near_you_card.layout: Horizontal 4-up card row (1488/4 ≈ 372 per tile, slight 9px gap)

featured_brand_tile.layout: 5-up grid (1452/5 ≈ 290 per slot, 24px gap → 266 tile width)

popular_boats_tile._status: Heading present at x=75 w=1347 but tiles not in 2026-05-23 probe scope (lazy-loaded below fold)

_known_matches_in_fidelity_md: Hero search bar (.ai-search-v2) shares structure with SRP search — Try + rotator + sparkle + magnifier (v=86, v=87)
Footer + columns match real BT layout
_capture_methodology: Open https://www.boattrader.com/ at 1512px viewport, scroll through each section to make it visible, then run the structural probe per section. Tile measurements taken from the first 3 children of each section's container. Lazy-loaded sections (Similar Boats, etc.) may require additional scroll triggers.
